item.title: Bonds Climb as Oil Holds Near a Three-Month Low: Markets Wrap
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: Bonds advanced ahead of the Federal Reserve’s policy decision, as a sharp recent slide in oil prices helped ease concerns of a renewed inflation shock. Yields on benchmark Australian and Japanese 10-year notes slipped around five basis points while those on similar-maturity Treasuries held near a one-month low. Asian stocks were little changed after a three-day rally while S&P 500 futures rose.

item.title: General Atlantic in Talks to Lead Funding for China’s Kling AI
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: Kuaishou Technology is in discussions with General Atlantic to lead a first round of financing for its video AI arm, seeking to secure a major US backer ahead of an initial public offering. Kling AI aims to raise more than $2 billion at a post-investment valuation of $18 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
